descriptionShort: Box score and recap of Toronto Maple Leafs defeating Calgary Flames 3-2, with Dave Andreychuk scoring the game-winning goal in the third period.
descriptionLong: Dave Andreychuk tipped a point shot past goaltender Trevor Kidd in the third period for his second goal to give Toronto a 3-2 victory over Calgary. The game featured two additional goals by Andreychuk and Wood for Toronto, while Calgary scored through Fleury and Zalapski. Toronto outshot Calgary 37-28 and converted on the power play in the third period.

attribution.headline: Maple Leafs 3, Flames 2 - Andreychuk Gets Winner
